steps.title: Spot the confirmation
steps.content: The first sentence says Laurent intended Fountain to challenge ideas about art. The next sentence says the sculpture did just that, so it confirms and emphasizes the previous claim.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: A signals replacement or contrast, B adds a separate point, and C compares similar things. The relationship here is confirmation: the sculpture accomplished the challenge that Laurent intended. The answer is D.
